text:
What would the name of Ganon’s form when he obtains all of the triforce be?
When he has the triforce of power, he can transform into Dark Ganon...
Then Dark Ganon becomes Lord Ganon when he gets the triforce of courage...
So then what would he become when he gets the triforce of wisdom, and therefore all three? Personally I’d call it Final Ganon.

text:
This is the most well animated RPG battle with CD-i characters I have ever seen. All of the animations (especially the idle animations) made the characters look very life-like while taking turns striking each other. Great job. I would love to see more of these.

By the way, what's the music you used for the fight?
